title: castanopsis cuspidata var. longicaudata
intro: Castanopsis cuspidata var. longicaudata, also known as the Chinese or Japanese chinquapin, is a variety of evergreen tree native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat conditions such as fever, sore throat, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Castanopsis cuspidata var. longicaudata include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine, and herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and decoctions made from its leaves, bark, and roots.
